headline: Bond Prices Surge, Bitcoin Enters $50k Supercycle

article.title: Soaring bond prices signal 'structural' shift and Bitcoin 'supercycle': Analyst
article.summary: Fixed-income investors are in a "panic" as government securities, once seen as low-risk, begin to crack, according to BitMEX researcher Shang Wu.

headline: Ethereum Founder Rebuffs Critics, Maintains $20B Neutral Stance

article.title: Buterin fires back at Ethereum Foundation critics, recommits to neutrality
article.summary: The Ethereum Foundation holds less than 1% of all ETH in circulation while other protocol foundations typically hold 10-50% of their native token's supply, the founder said.

headline: Oil Plunges 3% on Strait Reopening Talks

article.title: Oil Drops as US Touts Progress on Deal Toward Reopening Strait
article.summary: Oil dropped as the US and Iran edged toward a deal, although President Donald Trump said that Washington’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz would remain until an agreement was completed.

headline: Oil Plunges 3% on Iran Deal Hopes

article.title: Oil, Dollar Fall on Expectations Over Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Crude oil fell to the lowest level in more than two weeks and the dollar weakened on expectations that a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore oil flows may be near.

headline: Ethereum Foundation Slashes ETH Sales Amid Staff Exodus
